# Voprosy Politicheskoi Teorii — Author Guidelines (Synthetic Fixture)

**Journal:** Voprosy Politicheskoi Teorii
**Publisher:** Institute of Philosophy, Russian Academy of Sciences
**ISSN:** 5555-6666
**URL:** https://www.example-vpt.ru

## Aims and Scope

Voprosy Politicheskoi Teorii is a peer-reviewed journal publishing original
research in political theory, political philosophy, philosophy of law, and
social philosophy. The journal serves the Russian-speaking academic community
and focuses on both classical and contemporary political thought.

## Article Types

- **Research Article** (up to 40,000 characters): original theoretical research
- **Review Essay** (up to 20,000 characters): critical review of recent monographs
- **Discussion** (up to 15,000 characters): response to published articles

## Submission Requirements

- **Abstract:** 200-300 words (in Russian and English)
- **Keywords:** 5-10 (in Russian and English)
- **Citation style:** follow journal format (footnotes with full bibliographic data)

## Language Policy

All articles must be submitted in Russian. The journal is a Russian-language
publication. Bilingual metadata (title, abstract, keywords in Russian and
English) is required for international indexing purposes.

## Peer Review

- **Model:** Single-blind review
- **Timeline:** 3-6 months

## Indexing

RSCI, VAK, ERIH PLUS
